# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-flask-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-flask-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-flask-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-flask-app
          image: my-flask-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
---
